suggested_title: Akash Shanmugam - MS1, UCSF School of Medicine
prospect_notes: Akash Shanmugam attended Oxford College of Emory University and Emory College as an undergraduate, majoring in Neuroscience and Behavioral Biology (class of approximately 2023). He is a Bay Area native originally from Santa Clara, CA. He is now a first-year medical student (MS1, class of 2028) at UCSF School of Medicine. He is affiliated with the UCSF Department of Anesthesia, working in both the Pain Neuromodulation Lab and the AI Clinical Innovation Lab. In March 2025, he co-presented research on leveraging a targeted LLM approach for understanding predictors of post-surgical pain from clinical text. During his time at Emory, he was involved in community health initiatives including vaccine outreach events partnering with the Helping Hands Outreach Clinic.

_enrichment.title: MS1 at UCSF School of Medicine
